Pick Your Element

Which element of The Lazarus Method does your mantra connect to? This anchors your words to something real in your daily life.

🍃 Nourish
🏋️ Move
🌙 Rest
🔥 Challenge
🤝 Connect
📚 Learn
⚡ Spark

Build Your Mantra

Write a short phrase that captures your core drive within this element. Keep it punchy, personal, and honest. Something you'd actually say to yourself.

0 / 80

Need Inspiration?

Design Your Mantra

Choose a visual style. This is what it could look like on your wall, your phone, or your journal cover.

Classic Navy
Clean Cream
Gold Rush
Bold Type
Minimal

Mantra Locked

Your personal mantra is set. Now put it where you'll see it every single day. Repetition is the mechanism. Visibility is the trigger.

📱 Phone lock screen or home screen wallpaper
🪞 Bathroom mirror where you see it every morning
💻 Desktop wallpaper or sticky note on your monitor
📓 First page of your journal or planner
🚗 Dashboard, visor, or rearview mirror
